items.body_excerpt:
The Bucks return for Giannis reminds me a little of what they got for Kareem way back when — a bunch of good players (Bridgeman, Winters, Meyers, Elmore Smith) but no true stars. 

One difference: the Bucks got no picks in that deal.

items.body_excerpt: The Blazers' press release just says "head coach" and not "acting head coach" but I have been told there are currently no changes to the status of Chauncey Billups, who is still employed by the team while his legal case plays out.

items.title: It is interesting that the Blazers did get someone I consider to be a good coach on a 1-year guaranteed deal by leveraging the low supply of NBA Head Coaching jobs (30) with the high supply of good coaching candidates (more than 30)
items.author: Hoop Informatics

items.title: Friedrich Nietzsche posited that time repeats itself in an infinite loop, so … Both parties will just have to hope that theory proves true, again, but the loop is much, much smaller than it was the first time around.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
Friedrich Nietzsche posited that time repeats itself in an infinite loop, so … Both parties will just have to hope that theory proves true, again, but the loop is much, much smaller than it was the first time around.
🔖

items.title: An observation about NBA chit chat ... there's a 24-year-old All-Star taken high in the 2020 draft who has three years left on a 5-year max contract. His team hasn't made the playoffs in his career, but we don't hear anything about LaMelo Ball wanting out.

Per sources, Knicks assistant coach T.J. Saint will be head coach of the summer league team in Las Vegas.

Also hearing all the young guys on the championship roster (except, maybe third-year guard Tyler Kolek) will be playing.

items.title: My producer Antonio broke the Giannis trade to me live on stream. We had hundreds live and thousands overall❗️
items.author: Bryan Fonseca 🇵🇷
items.body_excerpt:
My producer Antonio broke the Giannis trade to me live on stream. We had hundreds live and thousands overall❗️

The league hasn't had a transaction dopamine hit like that in a bit. So many teams out East I can't wait to see next season.

And the summer is just getting started❗️

items.title: This worked out perfectly for Tom Dundon. Waited out the rest of the coaching openings to fill up and landed on someone who will probably be very good, who is also in his 50s and has been passed up for HC jobs for years and thus can’t be picky about contract terms.

items.body_excerpt: This worked out perfectly for Tom Dundon. Waited out the rest of the coaching openings to fill up and landed on someone who will probably be very good, who is also in his 50s and has been passed up for HC jobs for years and thus can’t be picky about contract terms.
